ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Peter Liederman, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings not reported. (212)
